claims.summary: Telemetry and sensory connectivity can diverge and need separate state.
claims.disposition: verify lane-specific connection state and asymmetric connectivity tests

claims.summary: A sensory connection flag alone does not prove recent outbound contact.
claims.disposition: verify last_sensory_sent_unix_s is updated only after successful send and enters reciprocity evidence

claims.summary: Pressure oscillation needs bounded windowed evidence rather than one adjacent delta.
claims.disposition: verify pressure-trend sample bounds, fast/slow smoothing, and oscillation classifications

claims.summary: Heartbeat timing and future timestamp skew should remain visible truth channels.
claims.disposition: verify heartbeat jitter classes, stale packets, and future-skew regressions

claims.summary: Changing reconnect behavior, telemetry cadence, smoothing windows, or stale windows changes live transport behavior.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work with replay, health, abort, and post-change response evidence
